emails.subject: Re: New CTPY Name Request
emails.body: Yes I've been working with Samuel Schott in Global Counterparty and Melissa Murphy. The new name has been entered into the system, and deal 573679 has been changed from New Counterparty to Sierra Pacific Industries, Inc. (That's the name Sierra Pacific Holding Co. is doing business as.) Thanks for checking in on this, though. Kate Rhonda L Denton 04/12/2001 07:08 AM
